text_original: Let me summarize this from someone who uses AI to hunt down monsters, its good because of the filter and its ability to find good targets, but that 24H time until you can chat again is terrible, so unfortunately I must search for a better AI app.
text_zh: 让我从一个用AI猎杀怪物的人角度总结一下，它好就好在过滤功能和锁定优质目标的能力，但24小时后才能再次对话的设定太糟糕了，所以很遗憾我必须找个更好的AI应用。
reply_original: Hi there! Thank you for your honest feedback. We're glad you appreciate our targeting filters! Regarding the 24H chat limit, we're actively exploring ways to improve this. Your input is valuable - could you share more details at support@fantachat.ai?
reply_zh: 你好！感谢你的真诚反馈。很高兴你喜欢我们的定向筛选功能！关于24小时聊天限制的问题，我们正在积极研究改进方案。你的意见对我们很重要——能否发送更多详情至support@fantachat.ai？
